assertions.expectation: Explains the key difference: surge upgrades nodes in-place with rolling replacement, blue-green creates an entirely new pool
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains surge upgrade replaces nodes one at a time vs blue-green creating an entirely new pool of nodes

assertions.expectation: Recommends blue-green for this scenario due to local SSDs (data can't migrate between nodes)
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly recommends surge upgrade instead of blue-green, despite acknowledging local SSD data locality issues

assertions.expectation: Explains that local SSD data is lost when a node is drained during surge upgrade
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains that local SSD data must be rebuilt from replicas during surge upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends GKE's autoscaled blue-green upgrade strategy configured with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy (NOT surge parameters like maxSurge/maxUnavailable which don't apply to blue-green), or describes the blue-green process if manual workflow is needed
assertions.reason: Response provides blue-green configuration using only --enable-blue-green-upgrade, missing the correct autoscaling parameters for blue-green upgrades

assertions.expectation: Addresses Cassandra-specific concerns: need to decommission from the ring before draining, rebuild on new nodes
assertions.reason: Response mentions data rebuilding but does not address the critical need to properly decommission nodes from the Cassandra ring before draining

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for creating the new node pool with matching configuration
assertions.reason: Response does not provide commands for creating a new node pool with matching configuration for blue-green deployment

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for cordoning and draining
assertions.reason: Response does not include specific kubectl commands for cordoning and draining nodes

assertions.expectation: Mentions PDB configuration to protect the Cassandra quorum during migration
assertions.reason: Response includes PodDisruptionBudget configuration with minAvailable: 7 to protect quorum during the upgrade process
